overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk city plaza at night during light rain. The camera moves from ground level up neon-lit stairs, along an elevated walkway past outdoor cafes with yellow umbrellas, and into a covered corridor with dramatic green and yellow neon lighting. The environment features high-tech architecture, holographic advertisements, and bioluminescent vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban plaza with glass pavilion and neon stairway entrance

agents.ego_description: walking across the wet plaza pavement toward a neon-lit stairway, passing a glass-enclosed structure with a red tree inside

entered.detail: modern glass box structure housing a large red Japanese maple tree with internal lighting
wide concrete staircase with cyan neon strip lighting along the handrail edges
cluster of large yellow patio umbrellas shading outdoor cafe seating
rain-slicked ground reflecting neon lights from surrounding buildings

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at ground level in a rain-soaked cyberpunk plaza. A glass pavilion containing a red tree sits to the right while neon-lit stairs rise ahead. Yellow umbrellas of an outdoor cafe are visible in the distance to the left, and the wet pavement reflects the surrounding neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor staircase with integrated neon lighting ascending to elevated walkway

events.description: begins ascending the wide concrete staircase with blue neon railings

agents.ego_description: climbing the stairs while the view opens up to reveal the outdoor cafe seating below on the left

entered.detail: stair handrail with continuous cyan LED strip lighting
large floating digital advertisement with glowing text visible above the cafe

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends the neon-lit concrete stairs, transitioning from ground level to an elevated perspective. The blue-lit railings frame the view as the outdoor cafe with yellow umbrellas moves from a distant element to a feature directly below and to the left. A holographic billboard becomes visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway overlooking outdoor dining plaza

events.description: reaches the top of stairs and transitions to level elevated walkway with glass railings

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated walkway, passing the overlook of the cafe area and approaching a covered bridge structure

notable_agents.action: figure walking ahead on the elevated walkway toward the covered bridge

entered.detail: transparent safety barrier with metal posts along the edge of the elevated walkway
building exterior covered with multiple illuminated advertising displays showing product images
enclosed pedestrian bridge with glowing green interior lighting visible at the end of the walkway

segments.scene_description: Walking along the elevated walkway with glass railings, the camera moves past the overlook of the yellow-umbrella cafe below. The path leads toward a covered pedestrian bridge glowing with green light in the distance. Digital billboards cover the building facades to the right, and the wet tiled floor reflects the neon ambiance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian bridge with glass floor sections overlooking lower plaza with red foliage

events.description: enters the covered walkway where lighting shifts to dominant green neon from ceiling panels
turns right to look down at the lower plaza level with dense red foliage before continuing forward

agents.ego_description: entering the covered bridge section while observing the red trees in the plaza below through glass floor panels

notable_agents.action: person walking ahead into the green-lit corridor

entered.detail: enclosed corridor with translucent ceiling panels emitting bright green light
transparent walkway panels revealing the plaza level below
dense cluster of red-leaved trees and vegetation visible through the glass floor in the lower plaza

segments.scene_description: Entering the covered pedestrian bridge, the lighting shifts dramatically to green neon from the ceiling panels. The walkway features glass floor sections revealing a lower plaza with striking red foliage trees below. The camera briefly turns to observe the view of the red trees before continuing through the corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic interior corridor with illuminated ceiling grid and tropical plantings

events.description: lighting transitions from green to warm yellow-green as the corridor deepens into the building interior

agents.ego_description: walking through the enclosed corridor past potted plants and digital signage, heading toward the distant exit

notable_agents.action: silhouetted figure standing near a digital screen on the left side of the corridor

entered.detail: geometric array of backlit ceiling panels creating a grid pattern of yellow and purple light
large tropical plants in planters lining the right side of the corridor
illuminated advertising display with text visible on the left wall

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through a fully enclosed futuristic corridor with a geometric illuminated ceiling grid casting yellow and purple light. Potted palm plants line the walkway, and digital advertising screens are mounted on the walls. The environment transitions from the green-lit entry to a warmer yellow-green interior as the camera proceeds deeper into the building.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rain-soaked ground-level plaza up into a series of brightly lit, enclosed futuristic corridors. It begins on wet pavement reflecting neon signage, passing a glass pavilion with a red tree before ascending a set of neon-lit concrete stairs. As the camera reaches the elevated walkway, the perspective shifts to overlook an outdoor cafe with yellow umbrellas, moving past digital billboards toward a distant, green-glowing pedestrian bridge. The scene then transitions into the covered bridge, where the lighting shifts to a vivid green and the floor becomes partially glass, revealing more red foliage in the plaza below. Finally, the camera proceeds deeper into a fully enclosed corridor, where the atmosphere transforms from green to a warmer yellow and purple glow beneath a geometric illuminated ceiling grid lined with potted palms.
